title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 26 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 26 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 26 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 26/09/2023
PBF at Shandong port dealt 929-935 yuan/mt; decreased 0-6 yuan/mt over yesterday. PBF at Tangshan port dealt 955 yuan/mt;increased 5 yuan/mt over yesterday. Although in the peak season of traditional industries, terminal demand is weak and steel shipments are average.
